name: My Program
goal: Max Snatch + C&J · Squat + Deadlift Build

phases.title: MESOCYCLE 1 — STRENGTH BASE (CHINESE)
phases.subtitle: Weeks 1–4 · 6/16–7/11 · High Frequency / Daily Squat / Pull Strength

intent.title: Week 1 · 6/16–6/20
intent.text: Establish Chinese-style frequency. Squat every training day. Heavy pull volume to rebuild back strength at the top of the pull and turnover. Snatch and clean to power above knee to drill the second pull.

exercises.name: Snatch Pull (3s to knee, accelerate)
exercises.note: Slow off floor, explode knee to extension

exercises.name: Snatch High Pull from Power Position
exercises.note: Bar to sternum — top-end pull + turnover

intent.title: Week 2 · 6/23–6/27
intent.text: Loading climbs. Pull percentages rise, squat volume holds. High pulls and Chinese pulls reinforce the top of the pull and turnover speed.

exercises.name: Snatch Pull (3s to knee, accelerate)
exercises.note: Slow off floor, explode knee to extension

exercises.name: Snatch High Pull from Power Position

intent.title: Week 3 · 6/30–7/4
intent.text: Peak loading week of meso 1. Heaviest pulls and deadlifts of the block. Squat volume at its highest frequency. Top-end pull and acceleration work at peak intensity.

exercises.name: Snatch Pull (3s to knee, accelerate)
exercises.note: Slow off floor, explode knee to extension

exercises.name: Snatch High Pull from Power Position

intent.title: Week 4 · 7/7–7/11
intent.text: Deload / transition. Drop volume significantly. Maintain intensity on key lifts. Prep for meso 2 force-acceleration block.

phases.title: MESOCYCLE 2 — FORCE & ACCELERATION (CHINESE)
phases.subtitle: Weeks 5–8 · 7/14–8/8 · Pull Acceleration / Power Variations / Strength Build

intent.title: Week 5 · 7/14–7/18
intent.text: Acceleration block begins. Pulls from blocks/deficit to attack knee-to-extension. Heaving snatch balance and tall snatch hammer the lockout. Squat strength shifts toward heavy triples.

exercises.name: Snatch High Pull from Power Position
Clean High Pull from Power Position

intent.title: Week 6 · 7/21–7/25
intent.text: Intensity climbs. Pull loads creep up, squats move to heavy doubles. Lockout and acceleration variations push percentages.

exercises.name: Snatch High Pull from Power Position
Clean High Pull from Power Position

intent.title: Week 7 · 7/28–8/1
intent.text: Peak loading week of meso 2. Heaviest pulls and squat singles of the block. Acceleration and lockout work at peak intensity before the deload.

exercises.name: Snatch High Pull from Power Position
Clean High Pull from Power Position

intent.title: Week 8 · 8/4–8/8
intent.text: Deload / transition. Reduce volume, maintain intensity. Rest up before meso 3 wave loading and the peak begin.

phases.title: MESOCYCLE 3 — PEAK & TEST
phases.subtitle: Weeks 9–12 · 8/11–9/5 · Wave Loading / RM Squats & Deadlifts / Olympic Total

intent.title: Week 9 · 8/11–8/15
intent.text: Wave loading introduced on both snatch and C&J. RM squat and deadlift work begins on Friday. Competition lifts dominate Monday. Pull and lockout volume tapering.

intent.title: Week 10 · 8/18–8/22
intent.text: Wave loading intensity climbs. 2RM squat and deadlift work. Competition lifts pushing toward 90%+.

intent.title: Week 11 · 8/25–8/29
intent.text: Peak intensity. Heaviest wave loading of the cycle. 1RM squat and deadlift work. Competition lifts at near-max. Intensity builds through the week then drops sharply on Saturday for a confident dress rehearsal.

exercises.name: Snatch
exercises.note: Heavy enough to feel authoritative — fast, confident, not maximal

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Light — stay fresh for test week

intent.title: Week 12 · 9/1–9/5 🏆
intent.text: Max out week. Mon/Tue/Wed = light opener feel + light accessory to stay sharp without accumulating fatigue. Fri/Sat = Olympic Total. New 1RMs on snatch, C&J, back squat, and deadlift.

exercises.name: Power Snatch
exercises.note: Fast and technical. Last snatch before the total.

exercises.name: Snatch Balance (empty bar)
exercises.note: Reinforce the drop. Feel the overhead.
